name: CardDesign
description: Available card designs for automated card sends

name.description: Display name of the card design (e.g., 'Thank you - Plain White')

key.description: Unique identifier for the card design (e.g., 'thank_you_plain_white')

imageUrl.description: URL to preview image of the card design

isActive.description: Whether this card design is available for use

isDefault.description: Whether this is a default card design provided by Scribe
